seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs.
new_constraint: The email must contain at least 15 sentences, with each paragraph consisting of no more than 4 sentences.
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs. The email must contain at least 15 sentences, with each paragraph consisting of no more than 4 sentences.
response:
Subject: Resignation - [Your Name]

Dear [Boss's Name], please accept this email as formal notification that I am resigning from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day of employment will be [Your Last Day]. I have genuinely appreciated the opportunities I have been given during my time here. This was not an easy decision to make.

I want to express my sincere gratitude for the professional development I have experienced. I have learned so much from you and from my colleagues. I am thankful for the support and guidance you have provided me throughout my tenure. I value the relationships I have built within this team immensely.

I am committed to ensuring a smooth transition during my remaining two weeks. Please let me know how I can best assist in training my replacement or wrapping up my current projects. I wish you and [Company Name] all the very best for continued success in the future. Thank you again for everything.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]<turn|>
